title: berteroa incana subsp. stricta
intro: Berteroa incana subsp. stricta, also known as Hoary Alison, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Berteroa incana subsp. stricta can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
